title: The Bride of Blackthorn Hall
description: Every firstborn Blackthorn daughter is promised, at twenty-one, to the thing that lives beneath the hall — and Cordelia has just turned twenty-one. But the creature in the dark is not the monster three centuries of family fear has made it, and the real curse, she is beginning to suspect, was never his at all. A lush gothic romance about a bargain, a bloodline, and a love built in the dark.
